claims.claim: In calibrated synthetic experiments with 1,000 labeled events, two sample shadow policies—a segment-aware policy and a conservative policy—yielded accuracy deltas of +0.204 and +0.053 over the production baseline (0.744), with changed-action precisions of 0.981 and 0.949 respectively.

evidence_refs.quote: We present a prototype harness for replaying labeled historical request logs through candidate decision policies in shadow mode, producing counterfactual audit records without production side effects. The harness enforces immutable replay events, append-only shadow audit trails, and side-effect leak accounting. claims.claim: This work addresses a specific sub-problem: given a set of labeled replay events—each recording a production action and a delayed label action—can a harness replay those events through candidate shadow policies, emit durable audit evidence, and summarize counterfactual quality metrics without any production side effects?
